mapper.select: SELECT id, file_name, store_key, file_type, business_type, file_path, file_size, content_type, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_file WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, file_name, store_key, file_type, business_type, file_path, file_size, content_type, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_file WHERE store_key = #{storeKey} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, file_name, store_key, file_type, business_type, file_path, file_size, content_type, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_file WHERE file_type = 'TEMPLATE' AND business_type = #{businessType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_file (id, file_name, store_key, file_type, business_type, file_path, file_size, content_type, description, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileName}, #{storeKey}, #{fileType}, #{businessType}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{description}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_file SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
